ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-15-2019 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Suey Ng and Nora Gin.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Meghan A. Miller, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Health Care and Rehabilitation, Inc.
Almaroof Apatira, Administrator for San Francisco Health Care and Rehabilitation, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Suey Ng or Nora Gin.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract/Common Counts was filed on June 15, 2018, and personally served on defendants Suey Ng and Nora Gin on September 7, 2018.
Defaults were entered as to defendants Suey Ng and Nora Gin on February 8, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, April 23, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Health Care and Rehabilitation, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendants Suey Ng and Nora Gin, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $106,373.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,952.90.
Attorney Fees - $5,000.00.

Total - $122,325.90.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
